title: Consolidation of Supervisory Instructions - Drafts for Comments
description: The Reserve Bank has constantly endeavoured to refine and strengthen its regulatory and supervisory framework with a view, inter alia, to rationalising the requirements and minimising compliance costs through periodic evaluation for their continued relevance. 2. In furtherance of this objective, Reserve Bank of India had undertaken a comprehensive consolidation exercise of the instructions administered by the Department of Regulation, on an ‘as is’ basis. Attention is drawn to Press
